_instructions: Copy this file to settings.json and fill in your details.
settings.json is gitignored — it stays on your pen drive only.
forms_folder: path to your SOP forms folder on the target Windows PC.
output_folder: where filled PDFs will be saved.
Y coordinates in forms.json are measured from the BOTTOM of the page.
A4 bottom = y:0, A4 top = y:841. Use CoordPicker to find coordinates.
